channel.title: Economics on The website of David Jones
channel.description: Recent content in Economics on The website of David Jones

item.title: The Economics of Trust in Veterinary Care
item.description: Reports over the past year have highlighted a sharp increase in veterinary fees across the United Kingdom, alongside a wave of consolidation in which independent practices have been absorbed by large corporate groups. The Competition and Markets Authority has now completed a review into the sector, and announced a series of measures, including a requirement for practices to publish price lists and the introduction of a price comparison website intended to strengthen competition and place downward pressure on costs.
